replies.msg:
EnhancedDate = class extends Date{
 constructor(){
  super();
  this.dateDoestExists = [[6, 4], [6, 9], [6, 12], [7, 21],[8, 31], [10, 1], [10, 10]];
 }
 toISOString(){
  this._sortDate(this.dateDoestExists);
  let now = new Date();
  let timeIsoString = now.toISOString().split('T')[1];
  let isoString = this._buildISOString(now, timeIsoString);
  for (var i = this.dateDoestExists.length - 1; i >= 0; i--){
   if (this._matchMonthAndDate(now, this.dateDoestExists[i][0], this.dateDoestExists[i][1])){
    const arr = this._getISOStringWithDelta(now, timeIsoString, 1);
    now = arr[0];
    timeIsoString = arr[1];
   }
  }
  return this._buildISOString(now, timeIsoString);;
 }
 _matchMonthAndDate(now, month, date){
  return now.getMonth() === month - 1 && now.getDate() === date;
 }
 _getISOStringWithDelta(now, timeIsoString, delta){
  now.setDate(now.getDate() - delta);
  const tSplit = timeIsoString.split(':');
  tSplit[0] = parseInt(tSplit[0]) + 24 * delta;
  timeIsoString = tSplit.join(':');
  return [now, timeIsoString];
 }
 _sortDate(dateArray){
  dateArray.sort((arr1, arr2) => {
   if (arr1[0] !== arr2[0]) return arr1[0] - arr2[0];
   else return arr1[1] - arr2[1];
  });
 }
 _buildISOString(now, timeIsoString){
  return now.toISOString().split('T')[0] + 'T' + timeIsoString;
 }
}
a = new EnhancedDate();
a.toISOString();

  super();
  this.dateDoestExists = [[6, 4], [6, 9], [6, 12], [7, 21],[8, 31], [10, 1], [10, 10]];
 }
 toISOString(){
  this._sortDate(this.dateDoestExists);
  let now = new Date();
  let timeIsoString = now.toISOString().split('T')[1];
  let isoString = this._buildISOString(now, timeIsoString);
  for (var i = this.dateDoestExists.length - 1; i >= 0; i--){
   if (this._matchMonthAndDate(now, this.dateDoestExists[i][0], this.dateDoestExists[i][1])){
    const arr = this._getISOStringWithDelta(now, timeIsoString, 1);
    now = arr[0];
    timeIsoString = arr[1];
   }
  }
  return this._buildISOString(now, timeIsoString);;
 }
 _matchMonthAndDate(now, month, date){
  return now.getMonth() === month - 1 && now.getDate() === date;
 }
 _getISOStringWithDelta(now, timeIsoString, delta){
  now.setDate(now.getDate() - delta);
  const tSplit = timeIsoString.split(':');
  tSplit[0] = parseInt(tSplit[0]) + 24 * delta;
  timeIsoString = tSplit.join(':');
  return [now, timeIsoString];
 }
 _sortDate(dateArray){
  dateArray.sort((arr1, arr2) => {
   if (arr1[0] !== arr2[0]) return arr1[0] - arr2[0];
   else return arr1[1] - arr2[1];
  });
 }
 _buildISOString(now, timeIsoString){
  return now.toISOString().split('T')[0] + 'T' + timeIsoString;
 }
}
